scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "yarn workspace stock-screener-backend dev" "yarn workspace stock-screener-frontend dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "yarn workspace stock-screener-backend start" "yarn workspace stock-screener-frontend start"
scripts.test: yarn workspace stock-screener-backend test && yarn workspace stock-screener-frontend test
scripts.format: yarn workspace stock-screener-backend format && yarn workspace stock-screener-frontend format
